'''鈭歞h-b-p-d''' ('''kadhabpedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calk|calk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calk|calk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-b-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadhabpedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhabpedoko|thidhabpedoko]] || [[word:jidhabpedoko|jidhabpedoko]] || [[word:shidhabpedoko|shidhabpedoko]] || [[word:kidhabpedoko|kidhabpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhabpedoko|thuthudhabpedoko]] || [[word:jujudhabpedoko|jujudhabpedoko]] || [[word:shushudhabpedoko|shushudhabpedoko]] || [[word:kukudhabpedoko|kukudhabpedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhabpedoko|thudhabpedoko]] || [[word:judhabpedoko|judhabpedoko]] || [[word:shudhabpedoko|shudhabpedoko]] || [[word:kudhabpedoko|kudhabpedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhabpedoko|thothodhabpedoko]] || [[word:jojodhabpedoko|jojodhabpedoko]] || [[word:shoshodhabpedoko|shoshodhabpedoko]] || [[word:kokodhabpedoko|kokodhabpedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhabpedoko|thodhabpedoko]] || [[word:jodhabpedoko|jodhabpedoko]] || [[word:shodhabpedoko|shodhabpedoko]] || [[word:kodhabpedoko|kodhabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhabpedoko|th忙dhabpedoko]] || [[word:j忙dhabpedoko|j忙dhabpedoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhabpedoko|sh忙dhabpedoko]] || [[word:k忙dhabpedoko|k忙dhabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhabpedoko|thathadhabpedoko]] || [[word:jajadhabpedoko|jajadhabpedoko]] || [[word:shashadhabpedoko|shashadhabpedoko]] || [[word:kakadhabpedoko|kakadhabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhabpedoko|thadhabpedoko]] || [[word:jadhabpedoko|jadhabpedoko]] || [[word:shadhabpedoko|shadhabpedoko]] || [[word:kadhabpedoko|kadhabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhabpedoko|thadhabpedoko]] || [[word:jadhabpedoko|jadhabpedoko]] || [[word:shadhabpedoko|shadhabpedoko]] || [[word:kadhabpedoko|kadhabpedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
